attacking_style: Does not appear to be an aggressive attacker; focuses on defensive positioning and following moves rather than initiating decisive attacks from distance.
team_tactics: Conserves team energy strategically, avoiding unnecessary work in groups. Relies on selective domestique support rather than sustained team tempo control.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preference, though capable of defending position on stage race climbs and positioning for GC contention.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest potential weakness in sustained aggressive racing where energy conservation alone is insufficient to gain time.
key_patterns: Tactically conservative: never pulls in groups, relies on wheel-following (Catalunya evidence)
Asserts team leadership role when in form (Vuelta, Catalunya leadership shown)
Recovers well between Grand Tours (Tour to Vuelta recovery demonstrated)
form_trajectory: unknown: 3.5 year gap between observations makes recent trajectory impossible to assess reliably
